steps.title: Use the target-expression shortcut
steps.content: The target $12x-2$ is close to $\left(3\right)(4x+5)$. Multiply the given equation $4x+5=17$ by $3$: $$12x+15=51.$$

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The requested value is 34. This method is faster than solving for $x$ because it transforms the given equation directly into the expression the question asks for.
